kCRC32CPowers[] is an array of length NUM_SIZE_BITS - NUM_DROPPED_BITS,
whose i'th entry is x^(2^(i + LOG2_BITS_PER_BYTE + NUM_DROPPED_BITS) -
CRC_BITS - 1) mod G. See kCRC32CPowers[] in the C++ source for more info.
